zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期下行压力显现，关注关键支撑位
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格报1836美元，较24小时内下跌1.12%，呈现弱势调整走势。短线来看，价格已接近日内低点，整体趋势偏空，但尚未跌破关键支撑区间，因此仍有反弹可能。高点1861.36构成近期阻力位，若突破此区域，可能触发短期技术反弹。

从技术指标解读，MACD负值达到-34.97，显示下行动能明显增强，但信号线未明确，趋势尚不稳定。SMA(20)位于1920.24上方，价格远低于均线，暗示多头力量不足，市场情绪偏谨慎。RSI缺失，但结合价格与均线关系，可推测处于中性偏弱区间。

支撑位方面，短期关注1830-1835美元区域，如果失守，将进一步测试1800美元心理关口。阻力位主要在1860-1870美元附近，若价格回升受阻，则可能延续整理或回落趋势。成交量若未同步放大，突破可信度有限。

交易建议上，短线投资者可考虑在支撑位附近逢低布局，但需严格设置止损；激进者可等待价格反弹接近阻力区进行部分减仓操作。中长期投资者则建议关注价格回到SMA(20)附近的反弹信号，以判断趋势反转或延续的可靠性。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 1836 after a 1.12% daily decline, sitting at the lower edge of the recent 24-hour range between 1836 and 1861.36. Price action remains under pressure, with ETH positioned well below the 20-day simple moving average at 1920.24. This gap suggests bearish momentum still dominates the short-term structure, while repeated failure to reclaim higher levels indicates sellers continue to control rallies and limit upside follow-through. The broader tone appears cautious rather than capitulative.

The separation from the SMA and the negative MACD reading of -34.97 reinforce a weakening momentum profile. Although the MACD signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD value alone reflects downside pressure and fading bullish participation. RSI data is unavailable, limiting overbought or oversold assessment, yet current positioning beneath recent highs and the moving average points toward a market still searching for reliable demand. Momentum recovery would likely require sustained closes above nearby resistance.

From a technical perspective, immediate support sits around 1836, which currently marks both the latest price and the daily low. A break beneath this area could expose ETH to deeper retracement pressure and accelerate short-term selling. Resistance is initially located near 1861, the recent intraday high, while the more significant barrier remains around the SMA zone near 1920. That moving average may attract renewed selling unless market sentiment and volume strengthen materially.

Trading conditions therefore favor a measured and disciplined approach. Short-term traders may prefer waiting for either a confirmed rebound above 1861 or a decisive breakdown below 1836 before committing to directional positions. Aggressive bullish entries before reclaiming resistance carry elevated risk given prevailing momentum signals. Longer-term participants may focus on whether Ethereum can gradually rebuild above 1920, as that would provide stronger evidence that bearish pressure is beginning to fade.
